subcodes.first_line: O 'Inayatu'llah-i-'Attar! Upon thee be the glory of the Chosen One! Thou hast been mentioned, and thus hath the glance of His loving-kindness been directed towards thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عنایه الله عطار علیه بهاء المختار ذکرت نموده لذا لحاظ عنایت بتو متوجه و ترا
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action
